title: Consumer Lifecycle, Cancellation, Readiness, and Graceful Shutdown · Inference Brief: Broker Cancellation
summary: A consumer reports ready before consume-ok, ignores broker cancellation, closes the connection while handlers run, and assumes cancel immediately stops every in-flight delivery. Planned artifact: Add and verify the broker cancellation increment in consumer registration, readiness, and shutdown state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle a null delivery callback and cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
Track consumer tags and channel generations so stale cancellation, delivery, and close events cannot mutate current state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Broker Cancellation · Theory Broker Cancellation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 7826 in a accessible municipal task intake with two worker pools. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to sequence readiness, cancellation, in-flight draining, deadline, and channel close; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Handle a null delivery callback and cancellation notifications as lifecycle events with cause, readiness, recovery, and ownership evidence.
